narrative:
Baughman Twp township has 2,923 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.4 percentage points.
